title: Call of Duty Mobile
description: Call of Duty Mobile brings console-quality FPS action to your phone with iconic maps, modes, and weapons from the franchise.

title: Fortnite
description: Fortnite is the completely free online game where you and your friends fight to be the last one standing in Battle Royale.

title: Roblox
description: Roblox is the ultimate virtual universe that lets you create, share experiences, and be anything you can imagine.

title: Asphalt 9: Legends
description: Asphalt 9: Legends features a top roster of real hypercars for you to drive unlike anything seen in other games.

title: Genshin Impact
description: Step into Teyvat, a vast world teeming with life and flowing with elemental energy. You and your sibling arrived here from another world.

title: PUBG Mobile
description: PUBG Mobile is a battle royale game where 100 players parachute onto an island and fight to be the last one standing.

title: Clash Royale
description: Enter the Arena! Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles.

title: Brawl Stars
description: Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile. Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful abilities.

title: Black Strike: War Shooter
description: Offline FPS shooter with long story missions, intense gunfights, vehicle combat, sniper shots, and a Zombie survival mode.

title: Overwatch Rush
description: A 4v4 top-down mobile hero shooter built from the ground up for mobile, set in the Overwatch universe.

title: Parasite Z
description: Survival horror inspired by Resident Evil. Explore an abandoned prison complex overrun by a parasite outbreak using Unreal Engine 5.

title: Katori: Katana Masters
description: Brutal samurai action with dynamic duels, devastating combos, and an epic revenge story set in feudal Japan.

title: Narin: Secrets of Dwarvenia
description: A 2.5D action game where you play as Narin, a dwarf warrior fighting to liberate Dwarvenia from invading goblins and monsters.

title: Barbie Horse Ride & Rescue
description: Ride and rescue beautiful horses as you uncover the mysteries of Moonrise Valley with Barbie.

title: Among the Sleep
description: A first-person horror adventure where you play as a two-year-old child exploring surreal and frightening environments.

title: Exhausted Man
description: A physics-comedy game where you help an exhausted person get through a crucial night, doing everything while lying down.

title: Construction World 2: Puzzle
description: Build and construct in this puzzle-simulation game featuring heavy machinery and construction challenges.

title: Go Ape Ship!
description: Co-op monkey mayhem in space! Work together with friends to keep your spaceship running in this chaotic party game.

title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin
description: An open-world action RPG set in the world of The Seven Deadly Sins with stunning visuals and epic combat.

title: Rainbow Six Mobile
description: The iconic tactical shooter comes to mobile with 5v5 PvP, destructible environments, and a growing roster of Operators.

title: Oceanhorn 3: Legend of the Shadow Sea
description: An epic action-adventure in the spirit of classic console RPGs. Explore the seas, solve puzzles, and battle enemies.

title: Subnautica: Below Zero
description: Dive into a freezing underwater adventure on an alien planet. Build bases, craft equipment, and uncover hidden secrets.

title: Where Winds Meet
description: An epic open-world Wuxia action RPG set in 10th-century China. Master the sword and uncover forgotten truths.

title: My Hero Academia: The Strongest Hero
description: Become the No. 1 Hero in this open-world action RPG based on the hit anime My Hero Academia. Master Quirks, team up with iconic heroes, and battle villains.

title: BLEACH: Soul Resonance
description: Officially authorized BLEACH action RPG. Step into the Soul Society, unleash Bankai, and fight alongside iconic Shinigami in story-driven combat.

title: The Hidden Ones
description: A stylish anime action game where you play as hidden warriors in a beautifully crafted feudal world.

title: HUNTER×HUNTER NEN×SURVIVOR
description: Official Hunter x Hunter mobile game. Mow down waves of enemies with Nen abilities in this survivor-roguelike featuring Gon, Killua, Hisoka, and more.

title: WIND BREAKER: Rebel Heroes
description: Become the strongest at Furin High in this 3D action RPG based on the WIND BREAKER anime. Tag-skill combat with iconic characters.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist Mobile
description: Experience the Elric brothers' journey in this official Fullmetal Alchemist RPG. Master alchemy and uncover the secrets of the Philosopher's Stone.

title: KAIJU NO. 8 THE GAME
description: Crush colossal Kaiju in epic turn-based battles. Based on the global hit anime, command the Defense Force and unleash devastating Ultimate attacks.

title: Attack on Titan: Brave Order
description: Join the Survey Corps with Eren, Mikasa, and Levi to fight the Titans. Real-time command battles with up to 4 players cooperative.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Phantom Parade
description: The first officially-licensed Jujutsu Kaisen mobile game. Exorcise Cursed Spirits with Yuji, Megumi, and the original cast in this immersive RPG.

title: Lord of Nazarick
description: Official OVERLORD mobile game. Step into the shoes of Ainz Ooal Gown and command 50+ characters in this turn-based strategy RPG.

title: Black Clover M: Rise of the Wizard King (Discontinued)
description: [DISCONTINUED - Service ended August 2025] Official Black Clover mobile RPG by Vic Game Studios. Joined Asta, Yuno and the Black Bulls in this 3D collection RPG. Game servers were shut down on August 21, 2025.

title: Pocket Incoming
description: A monster-collecting RPG inspired by classic Pokemon. Tame elemental creatures, breed them, and battle through a vast adventure world.

title: One Punch Man: World
description: Become a hero alongside Saitama in this official One Punch Man action RPG. Battle monsters in stunning 3D combat with iconic heroes.

title: Blue Lock: Blaze Battle
description: Official Blue Lock mobile soccer game. Join the deadly Blue Lock training program and become Japan's number one striker in 3D matches.

title: NARUTO: Ultimate Ninja STORM
description: The legendary Naruto fighting game on mobile. Experience 3D ninja battles with Naruto, Sasuke and friends through the iconic story.

title: One Piece: Ambition
description: Set sail with Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates in this official One Piece 3D fighting action game. Unreal Engine 4-powered combat across 13 chapters.

title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO
description: The legendary Budokai Tenkaichi successor, now playable on Android via Winlator. Experience full 3D Dragon Ball battles with 182 characters.

title: Solo Leveling: ARISE
description: Official Solo Leveling action RPG based on the hit webtoon. Become the Shadow Monarch and command an army of Shadow Soldiers in epic battles.

title: Demon Slayer: Hinokami Chronicles 2
description: Slay demons as Tanjiro, Nezuko, Zenitsu, and Inosuke in the sequel to Hinokami Chronicles. Playable on Android via Winlator emulation.

title: Junkyard Rush Racing
description: An arcade racer inspired by southern US daredevil car culture with 16 upgradeable cars, 12 tracks, and local split-screen multiplayer support.
features: Tournament, Race, and Time Trial modes
Local split-screen multiplayer with controller support

title: Drift Racing 3v3
description: A competitive 3v3 team-based drift racing game with officially licensed vehicles from Porsche, Nissan GT-R, Bugatti, and more.
features: Tracks across Los Angeles, Paris, Antarctica, and Bali
Real-time translation chat for global multiplayer

title: Gran Velocita
description: A realistic racing simulator featuring real physics with tire wear, temperature, and grip loss, with classes from Street to F1.
features: Real physics with tire wear, temperature, and pressure simulation
Multiple car classes (Street, GT4, GT3, LMP, F4, F1)
Full car setup customization and telemetry

title: Drive CSX
description: A realistic car crash simulator with advanced soft-body physics, over 60 vehicles, and open-world sandbox driving with detailed damage deformation.
features: Advanced soft-body physics with real-time collision deformation
Over 60 vehicles including trucks, SUVs, and racing cars
Open-world sandbox for free driving and crash scenarios
Environmental effects with mud, water, and rain physics

title: Highway Racer Pro
description: The most realistic highway traffic racing game on mobile, featuring real car physics, highways inspired by Japan, Germany, Brazil, and the USA.
features: Real highways inspired by Japan, Germany, Brazil, and the USA
Dynamic weather (snow, fog, rain, clear skies)
Deep car customization with body kits, paint, and rims

title: Desert Safari Hajwala
description: A drifting and desert racing game featuring realistic vehicle dynamics, SUVs and sports cars, with multiplayer voice chat and destructible environments.
features: Premium drifting with realistic vehicle dynamics
Huge collection of customizable SUVs and sports cars
Unique football match mode and desert exploration
Real-time voice chat and multiplayer meetups

title: Real Driving School
description: A driving and car parking simulation with stunning graphics, realistic physics, open world map, and three modes: Career, Free Play, and Online multiplayer.
features: Realistic car handling and damage system
Career mode with traffic rule enforcement

title: Touchgrind BMX 3
description: An extreme BMX sports game with real-time 12-player multiplayer trick battles, elimination races, and a single-player Freestyle mode.

title: Racing Zone: Car & Moto
description: A high-speed traffic racer with swipe-to-steer controls, nitro boosts, and multiple modes including Career, Endless, Time Attack, and Reverse Traffic.
features: Precision swipe steering and nitro boost system
Career, Endless, Time Attack, and Reverse Traffic modes
Deep vehicle customization (engines, turbos, rims, wraps)
Dynamic day/night cycles and weather effects

title: Lego Hill Climb Adventures
description: A LEGO-themed hill climb racing adventure blending classic Hill Climb Racing gameplay with LEGO worlds, vehicle customization, and collectible minifigures.
features: LEGO vehicle customization with collectible bricks and minifigures
Multiple unlockable locations with hidden secrets

title: Car Driving Multiplayer
description: Open-world driving experience with customizable vehicles, realistic physics, and multiplayer racing across a detailed open-world map.

title: Rebel Racing
description: Collect and customize real licensed supercars and classics, then race head-to-head against rivals across stunning West Coast locations.
features: Deep car customization with turbos and add-ons

title: Turbo Tornado
description: An open-world racing game set in San Lurito featuring drift, drag, and police chase modes with multiple vehicle types.
features: Multiple vehicle types (cars, trucks, helicopters, motorcycles)
Animated customization with LED spoilers and wraps

title: Stock Car Racing
description: Professional oval track racing with close to 300 unique cars, 6 tracks, and realistic crash physics with detachable panels and damage simulation.
features: Advanced crash physics with damage simulation
Full car customization with paintshop and upgrades

title: Road Redemption
description: Post-apocalyptic motorcycle combat racing with roguelite progression. A spiritual successor to Road Rash with melee weapons and brutal road rage action.
features: Bike and character upgrades between runs

title: Racing Xperience
description: The most comprehensive mobile driving simulator with 230+ customizable vehicles, multiple racing modes, open-world maps, and dynamic weather.

title: Offroad League
description: Console-quality offroad racing with a massive 4 km squared open-world map, ultra-realistic vehicle physics, and user-created tracks.

title: Riptide GP: Renegade
description: Arcade-style hydrojet racing through dynamic water environments. Perform stunts and compete in illegal races to reclaim your reputation.
features: Local split-screen for up to 4 players
Dynamic water physics and interactive tracks

title: Rally Horizon
description: Open-world rally racing with ultra-detailed supercars, diverse environments from deserts to snow, and a walkable garage.

title: CarX Rally
description: Realistic rally racing simulator with detailed physics, car damage, dynamic weather, and multiple championship modes across varied terrain.
features: Diverse tracks with varied terrain and weather
Detailed car configuration and tire selection

title: Static Shift Racing
description: An open-world street racing game set in Static Nation featuring 80s and 90s legendary cars with deep customization and competitive multiplayer.
features: Open world with urban highways, industrial zones, and mountain passes
Multiple race types: circuit, sprint, drift attack, marker hunt

title: Horizon Chase 2
description: A retro-inspired arcade racer paying tribute to classic 90s racing with vibrant visuals, 55+ tracks with dynamic weather, and split-screen multiplayer.
features: 55+ tracks with weather conditions affecting gameplay
Car customization and stat upgrades throughout World Tour

title: Rocket Racing
description: A supersonic arcade racer within Fortnite where up to 12 players drift, fly, and boost through wild tracks. Built by Rocket League creators Psyonix.
features: Up to 12-player online racing with ranked and casual modes
Boost meter mechanics with wall/ceiling driving

title: Car Parking Multiplayer 2
description: A massive driving simulator with 160+ cars featuring real interiors, open-world multiplayer with free walking, and 82 real-life parking and driving challenges.
features: 160+ cars with real interiors and mechanical transmission
Open-world multiplayer with voice chat and friend lists
Multiple modes: Police, Drone, Taxi, Drag Racing
Engine tuning with swappable engines, turbos, and gearboxes

title: Car Parking Multiplayer
description: A hugely popular car parking and driving simulator with 100+ cars, open-world multiplayer with free walking, and extensive car tuning.
features: 100+ cars with real interiors and adjustable suspension
Open-world multiplayer with voice chat and gas stations
Engine swaps, turbo tuning, gearbox, and exhaust customization
CPM Editor for creating custom worlds

title: Gear.Club Stradale
description: A premium racing simulation set in Tuscany, Italy where you build clubs with friends, collect and customize dream cars, and compete in exclusive events.
features: Club-based multiplayer set in Tuscany, Italy
Licensed real-world cars with detailed customization
Daily, weekly, and monthly exclusive content and events

title: Wreckfest
description: A physics-based demolition derby and racing game with no-rules carnage, realistic vehicle damage, and deep car customization.
features: Realistic physics-based vehicle destruction and damage
Career mode with unlockable content and challenge modes
Vehicle customization: defensive and performance parts
Local multiplayer across iOS and Android with 120hz support

title: Ace Racer
description: A high-speed arcade racer by NetEase featuring 100+ licensed vehicles from 25+ manufacturers with unique ultimate skills for each car.
features: Unique ultimate skill for each vehicle
Extensive customization: paint, decals, rims, lights

title: OWRC: Open World Racing Cars
description: A realistic open-world street racing simulator set on a 7x7 mile Hawaiian island featuring 74 cars with 3D cockpits and realistic driving physics.
features: 74 cars with 3D cockpit views and realistic physics
Free-roam mode and competitive races against 54 AI racers

title: Beach Buggy Racing 2
description: A fun-filled 3D kart racing game with 55+ collectible cars, 45+ upgradeable powerups, and online multiplayer tournaments.
features: 55+ collectible cars and multiple unique drivers
Fantastical themed tracks: pyramids, castles, pirate ships

title: Drive Zone Online
description: An open-world car driving simulator featuring street racing, drift racing, and drag racing with extensive car customization and multiplayer for up to 32 players.
features: Online multiplayer with up to 32 players

title: Race Max Pro
description: A mobile racing simulator featuring street racing, drifting, and drag racing with licensed supercars from top manufacturers.

title: Assetto Corsa Mobile
description: A premium racing simulation featuring 59 officially licensed cars from 18 manufacturers and 9 laser-scanned real-world circuits.
features: 59 licensed cars from Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini, etc.
9 laser-scanned real circuits (Brands Hatch, Laguna Seca, Imola)
Multiple game modes (Career, Time Attack, Free Practice)

title: Racing Master
description: A high-fidelity racing simulation by NetEase and Codemasters featuring 100+ officially licensed vehicles with realistic visuals and real-time multiplayer.
features: 100+ officially licensed vehicles from top brands

title: CarX Street Racing
description: An open-world street racing game set in Sunset City with realistic physics, extensive vehicle customization, and a full career mode.

title: Disney Speedstorm
description: A hero-based combat kart racer featuring Disney and Pixar characters with arcade-style racing, nitro boosts, and tracks inspired by iconic Disney worlds.
features: Playable Disney and Pixar characters (Mickey, Buzz, Jack Sparrow, etc.)
Combat racing with power-ups and abilities

title: GRID Legends
description: A premium racing game combining arcade thrills with simulation handling, featuring a cinematic story mode and 10 racing disciplines with all DLC included.
features: Cinematic story mode with live-action sequences
10 racing disciplines (circuit, elimination, time trials, etc.)

title: Need for Speed: Most Wanted
description: The iconic open-world racing experience on mobile with 40+ customizable cars, intense police chases, and full car damage mechanics.
features: 40+ customizable cars to unlock and race
Intense police chase and evasion gameplay
Open-world racing with full car damage

title: Asphalt Legends (Asphalt 9)
description: An arcade racing game featuring 300+ licensed cars from elite manufacturers like Ferrari, Porsche, and Lamborghini with cross-platform multiplayer racing.
features: Extensive career mode with seasonal content
Club system with cooperative multiplayer modes
